overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a foggy marsh at dusk, transitioning into grassy hills. The atmospheric scene features a continuous journey from dead wetlands to living grassland along a narrow dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy marsh with dead trees and wooden fence posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through the foggy marsh, flanked by dead trees and wooden posts

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts with rope barriers lining the left side of the marsh path
leafless dead trees scattered throughout the foggy marsh landscape
wet marshy terrain with patches of grass and mud surrounding the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the wetlands

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, foggy marsh at dusk. Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path lined with wooden fence posts on the left. Dead trees stand silhouetted against the hazy blue sky, and the ground is visibly wet and marshy. The atmosphere is somber and atmospheric with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from marsh to grassland

events.description: environment transitions from foggy marsh to grassy terrain, wooden fence posts disappear from view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the ground becomes drier and grassier, with healthier vegetation replacing the dead marsh trees

entered.detail: dry grassy ground replacing the marshy mud, with denser green vegetation
green leafy trees beginning to appear in the distance, replacing the dead marsh trees

segments.scene_description: The marsh gradually gives way to grassland as the wooden fence posts end and the ground becomes firm and grassy. The dead trees fade into the distance behind, replaced by healthier green trees ahead. The fog lifts slightly, revealing more of the surrounding landscape as the path continues forward.

events.description: path begins ascending a grassy hillside, terrain becomes more elevated

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the grassy path, surrounded by dense green vegetation and approaching a large tree at the hilltop

entered.detail: elevated grassy terrain with the path climbing upward
mountain range visible on the horizon against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The path climbs a grassy hillside with dense vegetation on both sides. The terrain is noticeably elevated compared to the marsh below. Healthy trees line the route, and distant mountains become visible on the horizon. The character continues the steady ascent toward a large tree at the hilltop as dusk settles over the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a somber, foggy marsh that gradually transforms into a vibrant, elevated grassland at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path lined with wooden fence posts, where dead trees stand silhouetted against a hazy blue sky and wet ground. As the fence posts end, the marshy terrain gives way to firm, grassy earth and the fog lifts, allowing the dead trees to fade into the distance while healthier green foliage appears ahead. The scene then shifts as the path climbs a lush hillside with dense vegetation, elevating the perspective to reveal distant mountains on the horizon. Finally, the camera continues a steady ascent through the greenery toward a large tree at the hilltop as the light of dusk settles over the landscape.
